hero.name: Marcus Rodrigues
hero.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
hero.description: +5 years developing large-scale platforms and distributed systems. Specialized in C#/.NET, PHP/Laravel, and Vue.js, with focus on clean architecture, REST APIs, and microservices.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience creating and maintaining large-scale platforms and distributed systems. Working from product conception to full implementation, always focused on best practices and scalability.

contact.title: Let's Connect?
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Get in touch!
